cells.rationale: Early proof point that sets the authoring contract (frontmatter/POINTER/NOT-for); moderate new-file authoring where convention precision pays permanent context load.

Hardest task: a ~200-260 line five-rung triage ladder that must not contradict dense CLAUDE.md Autopilot invariants (sticky taxonomy, resolver-first sequencing, wedge-proof bounce gating); safety-shaped prose needing strong holistic reasoning.
Three bounded, reference-shaped prose additions with byte-identical BAKE guards; additions land outside guards so risk is mechanical and well-scoped.
Small reference-file + one-liner pointer edits; --help/anchor constraints are checkable and single-sourced, adequate for a careful mid-tier sonnet pass.
Cross-surface consistency audit across six files (piloting/blocked-mechanics/NOT-for web) plus full gate run; benefits from opus's holistic drift-detection and correct BLOCKED escalation judgment.
